title: MopEase 2025 Ultra-Premium Flat Mop & Bucket Set - Waterproof Transparent Cover - Visual Cleaning Indicator - 3 Chamber Design For Clean & Dirty Water Separation, For Tile, Laminate & Hardwood Floors
features: 1. SELF-CLEANING 3-CHAMBER SYSTEM Keep clean and dirty water separate for a more hygienic mop every time. The triple-bucket design ensures your floors stay cleaner, longer.
2. HANDS-FREE WRINGING DESIGN Enjoy effortless cleaning with a built-in flat scraper system. Just dip, press, and mop—no bending, splashing, or dirty hands.
3. VISUAL CLEANING INDICATOR Track when your mop pad needs rinsing with the integrated visual cue system—clean smarter, not harder.
4. BUILT TO LAST WITH ALUMINUM ALLOY High-strength aluminum alloy panel withstands heavy daily use—lightweight yet extremely durable for long-term performance.
5. REUSABLE MICROFIBER PADS INCLUDED Includes two ultra-absorbent, machine-washable microfiber pads that work on hardwood, tile, marble, and more.
6. UPGRADED WATERPROOF COVER Enhanced protection against spills and moisture for added durability.
7. 10,000+ BRUSH WIRES Provides superior cleaning power for a more effective and thorough cleaning experience.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Mop Head, 2x Mop Pad, Telescopic Handle, Bucket
